data.title: Bitcoin's price rose over 2.5% to $93,493.57 as it aligns with macro trades via ETFs amid U.S. inflation data.
data.description: Bitcoin's recent increase appeared to be a standard reaction within the cryptocurrency market, primarily influenced by macroeconomic factors rather than crypto-specific events. Following the release of U.S. inflation data, which indicated a 0.3% rise in December and a year-on-year increase of 2.7% in headline inflation, with core inflation easing to 2.6%, Bitcoin surged over 2.5% to approximately $93,493.57. This upward trend was closely tied to the behavior of growth stocks in response to changing expectations regarding the Federal Reserve's potential easing actions later in the year, particularly as January is deemed unlikely for any policy shifts. It is noteworthy that Bitcoin's correlation with rates-sensitive assets through ETFs has strengthened, signaling a shift towards a more macro-driven trading environment.

data.title: Warren Buffett's successor at Berkshire Hathaway, Greg Abel, will be paid $25 million as CEO, 250 times more than Buffett's $100,000 salary.
data.description: At the end of 2025, Warren Buffett stepped down as CEO of Berkshire Hathaway Inc (NYSE: BRK). As of 2026, the conglomerate will experience changes, including the salary of the new CEO, Greg Abel. Abel, who succeeded Buffett and has prior experience leading Berkshire's energy and non-insurance divisions, faces the challenge of following in the footsteps of the renowned investor, often dubbed the "Oracle of Omaha." In his new position, Abel will be compensated significantly more than Buffett. A recent filing by Berkshire Hathaway disclosed that Abel's base salary will be $25 million, a substantial increase from Buffett's previous base salary of $100,000. This signifies that Abel's new salary is 250 times higher than Buffett's. Investors are anticipating continued success for Berkshire under Abel's leadership as they look for strong performances from the company's stock.

data.title: Boeing outperformed Airbus in 2025 with more net orders. Boeing shares hit buy point, reported by Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: New data reveals that in 2025, Boeing recorded a higher number of commercial net orders compared to Airbus. The surge in sales has led to a favorable stock performance, with Boeing's shares reaching a buy point. Investor's Business Daily reported on this positive development.

data.title: Alphabet's stock reaches record high following AI deal with Apple as software stocks decline on Wall Street.
data.description: Alphabet achieved a new milestone as its stock reached an all-time high after Wall Street companies increased their price targets on Google stock following a recent artificial intelligence (AI) agreement with Apple. As a result of the deal, Google's momentum has continued in the market. Conversely, software stocks experienced a downturn during the same period.

data.title: Construction Partners stock showing strong technical performance; Relative Strength Rating upgrade. Will it surpass recent record high?
data.description: Construction Partners has received a Relative Strength Rating upgrade indicating enhanced technical performance. This raises the question of whether this positive trend will persist. The stock is setting new records, pointing towards a promising future for Construction Partners in the market.

data.title: Moderna stock receives a healthy relative strength rating jump, indicating improved technical performance.
data.description: Moderna has received a boost in its Relative Strength Rating, indicating a positive trend in its technical performance. This upgrade suggests potential for further improvement in the stock’s performance.

data.title: TAL Education Group stock sees improved technical strength with rising price performance and upgraded IBD Relative Strength Rating.
data.description: TAL Education Group's American Depositary Receipt (ADR) has demonstrated a positive trend in price performance, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating. The stock of TAL Education Group has shown improved technical strength in recent evaluations.

data.title: Consumer Watchdog urges Uber to disclose exec's conflict of interest to shareholders regarding a ballot measure that could bring millions to her household.
data.description: A letter was sent by Consumer Watchdog to Uber's CEO and board of directors on January 13, 2026, urging them to disclose crucial information to shareholders. The letter highlighted that Uber's top policy executive in the West has the potential to earn millions of dollars for her household if Uber proceeds with its ballot measure.

data.title: SymphonyAI unveils new CINDE Merchandising Agents with agentic AI for core decisions, supported by Microsoft Foundry and Azure. - 93 characters
data.description: SymphonyAI, a renowned global leader in Vertical AI product platforms, unveiled the latest iteration of CINDE Merchandising Agents, marking the introduction of a groundbreaking series of Merchandising Agents that integrate agentic AI into weekly, promotional, launch, and reset workflows. Specifically designed for merchants, the CINDE Merchandising Agents usher in a new era of autonomous, role-based intelligence for the choices that impact in-store merchandising margin. Among the key offerings is The Merchant Planner – a tool tailored for managing weekly sales promotions.

data.title: Dow and S&P 500 fall from highs, Caterpillar eyes milestone; live coverage. Significant market movements discussed.
data.description: On Tuesday, the Dow and S&P 500 experienced a decline from their previous record highs. Despite this, Caterpillar was seen making progress towards achieving a significant milestone. The stock market fluctuations were covered in real-time by Investor's Business Daily, documenting the shifts in the Dow and S&P 500 indices. The market update detailed the drop from the recent highs and the noteworthy ascent of Caterpillar. The continuous live coverage provided insights into the dynamic nature of the stock market, tracking the movements of key financial indicators.

data.title: Defense Sec. Hegseth lays out AI strategy for future space missions, plans to deploy across classified networks despite Grok warnings.
data.description: Pete Hegseth, the Defense Secretary, has announced plans for the deployment of artificial intelligence (AI) throughout classified networks at the Pentagon. This decision comes amidst ongoing concerns raised by critics regarding the potential risks associated with Grok.

data.title: Consolidated Credit offers free monthly webinars on debt strategies, tax preparation, and financial freedom.
data.description: A series of complimentary online seminars are being offered every month to assist individuals in selecting the most suitable debt management plan, getting ready for a hassle-free tax period, and achieving financial autonomy. These webinars are provided by Consolidated Credit, a prominent financial education and counseling entity based in Fort Lauderdale, Florida. The initiative aims to educate consumers on effective strategies for managing debt, preparing for taxes, and attaining financial freedom. Participants can access these webinars to enhance their financial knowledge and ensure a secure financial future. The first webinar is scheduled for January 13, 2026.
